name: Cosmo: execute complete should author Fixed In (dod hard-requires non-empty)
description: complete v0.1.0 never writes Fixed In, but dod.7.fixed_in hard-requires a non-empty value and mechanical-bounces within ~1 min; agents must hand-set it.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: execute complete finalized without authoring Fixed In, while review DoD hard-requires a non-empty Fixed In, causing mechanical bounce after otherwise complete work. Variants: (1) normal code WI derives and writes Fixed In from the landed HEAD commit; (2) no-code/operational WI supports a descriptive landed-artifact value instead of a fabricated SHA; (3) underivable/empty Fixed In is refused before transition. Regression coverage: add/update skills/execute/execute.test.ts and review fixed-in coverage so these variants fail without the fix and pass with it.
